response.global_summary: The video shows Kobo Kanaeru singing 'Bokura no 16-bit Sensou' by Sasakure.UK while playing guitar on a beach. Following a sudden change, a skit occurs where Takanashi Kiara finds Kobo collapsed on the sand.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru singing 'Bokura no 16-bit Sensou' by Sasakure.UK while playing acoustic guitar on a beach setting.
A dramatic transition where Kobo is struck by lightning, followed by a skit involving Takanashi Kiara arriving on the beach.
